scripts.test: bun test apps/desktop/tests apps/extension/tests apps/cloud/tests packages/schema/tests packages/signals/tests
scripts.build:prototype: bun run build:desktop && bun run build:extension
scripts.package:local: bun run package:desktop && bun run package:extension
scripts.validation:smoke: bun run research/validation.ts --input tests/fixtures/research-session.jsonl --output research/validation-smoke-report.json --markdown research/validation-smoke-report.md --run-id fixture-smoke
